description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub Release that triggers on push to main branch when Version.txt changes. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference unless it's the main branch. For the p4lang/p4c repository, it checks out the code, extracts the version from Version.txt, creates a GitHub release with the version as a tag, sets up Docker Buildx, logs in to DockerHub, and builds and pushes a Docker image tagged with the version to the registry.
